budget.description: Set and inspect daily budgets by source of truth: global config, Policy Namespace, Team, API Key, inherited, or unset.
budget.title: Budget
cache.note: Actual cost includes provider cache discounts.
cache.title: Provider Cache Savings
chain.conditional: Checked only when the request carries this scope.
chain.selected: This is the selected budget scope.
chain.title: Blocking Rule Order
edit.notes.api_key: API Key budgets are stored on the Dashboard-managed key policy. Empty values unset the key limit and leave Team, Policy Namespace, and Global checks active.
edit.notes.namespace: Policy Namespace budgets are written through the config-backed namespace API and validated before hot reload. Empty values unset that namespace limit.
edit.notes.team: Team budgets are stored on the local Team policy. Empty values unset the team limit and leave Policy Namespace and Global checks active.
edit.title: Edit {{scope}} Budget
pricing.title: Model Pricing (per 1M tokens)
rules.noScopeDescription: This scope has no direct daily token or cost rule. Requests still inherit checks from earlier active scopes in the blocking order.
rules.title: Budget Rules
scopeSource.description: The selected scope shows where the limit is stored, whether it is directly configured, and which earlier scopes still block traffic first.
scopeSource.editable: Safe edits use the existing {{target}} path.
scopeSource.externalReadOnly: This scope is visible here but managed outside the Dashboard budget editor.
scopeSource.globalReadOnly: Global budgets are config-backed in this release. Edit gateway.config.yaml and reload config.
scopeSource.title: Scope and Source of Truth
